# R.J. Heating & Cooling

## Summary
R.J. Heating & Cooling is a family-owned HVAC contractor based in Cleveland, Ohio, serving the west side and surrounding suburbs since 1946. With 80+ years of experience, NATE-certified technicians, and a reputation for honest service with no upselling, they are one of Cleveland's most trusted heating and cooling companies.

## Location
4810 Briar Road, Cleveland, OH 44135
Service area: Cleveland, Lakewood, Parma, Brooklyn, Garfield Heights, Strongsville, North Olmsted, Westlake, Rocky River, Bay Village, Fairview Park, Berea, Middleburg Heights, Brook Park, Euclid

## Contact
Phone: (216) 961-8428
Website: https://rj-heating-cooling-cleveland.nule.io
Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00 AM - 4:30 PM | 24/7 Emergency Service

## Services
- Air Conditioner Repair & Service: Diagnosis, repair, and seasonal servicing of central air conditioning systems for residential and commercial customers.
- Furnace Repair & Service: Expert furnace troubleshooting, repair, and maintenance to restore heat quickly and safely in any season.
- Heat Pump Repair & Service: Full-service heat pump repair and maintenance covering all major brands and system types.
- Ductless Mini-Split Service: Installation, repair, and maintenance of ductless mini-split systems with professional technician training on operation.
- Geothermal System Service: Specialized service and maintenance for geothermal heating and cooling systems.
- Preventive Maintenance Programs: Scheduled maintenance plans to keep HVAC systems running efficiently and prevent costly breakdowns.
- Indoor Air Quality Solutions: Products and services to improve air quality, filtration, and humidity control inside the home.
- Commercial HVAC Services: Heating and cooling repair, maintenance, and installation for commercial properties and rental portfolios.

## Credentials
- Bryant Authorized Dealer
- BBB Accredited Business
- NATE-Certified Technicians
- Founded 1946 - 80+ years serving Cleveland
- Family owned and operated

## Reviews
4.7 stars, 324 reviews on Google
Selected quotes:
- "If you want to deal with a company that prides itself on ethical standards, customer service and quality delivered, look no further than R J Heating & Cooling. It was the smoothest interaction I have ever had with a service provider EVER!!!" - Sachin Malhotra
- "I had a great experience with this HVAC company for both my fall furnace maintenance and recent AC inspection. Scheduling was easy, communication was clear, and they showed up right on time. Justin, the technician who handled my AC service, was especially excellent—professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely kind." - Donna Nestor
- "Quick and friendly service to get my heat back on in the middle of a record-breaking cold spell when other contractors were backed up for days. I can't speak highly enough about these guys!" - Jimm B
- "I can not recommend R.J. or their employee Justin enough. I had someone else come out and tell me deadly CO2 was leaking into my home and I needed a new boiler. Justin came here for a second opinion. I did not need a new boiler—he only had to slow the flow of gas down coming into the home. All my future dealings with my boiler and AC will be with R.J." - J F

## Why Choose R.J. Heating & Cooling
- Honest, no-pressure service — technicians diagnose the real problem and never upsell unnecessary repairs or replacements
- Fast emergency response — 24/7 availability with same-day or next-morning service even during peak cold weather
- 80+ years of experience serving Cleveland and the west side suburbs since 1946
- Named technicians with consistent praise — Justin, Bill, and Blake are repeatedly called out by reviewers for professionalism and expertise

## About
R.J. Heating & Cooling was founded in 1946 and has spent over eight decades building a reputation for honesty, quality workmanship, and genuine care for Cleveland homeowners. Owned and operated by Charles Dolph, the company runs on the principle that customers deserve straight answers, fair prices, and technicians who fix the real problem — not the most expensive one. From emergency furnace calls in the dead of winter to routine AC maintenance, R.J. Heating & Cooling delivers the kind of reliable, no-nonsense service that keeps customers coming back for decades.
